name: EOS state: NON_VMOC — standard termination, no VMOC involvement
description: Baseline NON_VMOC case. EOS is a standard agreed EOS with no VMOC. Fees drawn match entitlement, cash in hand is sufficient to cover the creditor shortfall. Expected: eos_state = NON_VMOC, waterfall not triggered, standard cashier instruction, no provisional risk flag.

locked_model.retention_rule: First 10 contributions retained for Nominee fee

notes: Cash in hand £201.77 > shortfall £111.77. No fee movement required. Standard instruction: distribute £111.77 to creditors. No provisional flag because eos_state is NON_VMOC.
